an actor whose ports have types. This interface defines the method to get type constraints from an actor. The ports on a TypedActor are constrainted to be TypedIOPorts. Since: Ptolemy II 0.2 Version: $Id: TypedActor.java,v 1.24 2003/01/08 01:15:38
